spec_match.rationale: Page demonstrates the headline `text-justify` CSS property surface (text-justify, CSS, text-align, inter-character); residual gaps in spec vocabulary: no obvious gaps.

interactive.rationale: Live UI is real (button, input); controls include "Latin"; "Formal"; "Long words" — well past the no-static-card bar.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Feature-index blurb and page H1/lede share the same framing and surface the same API affordances.

edge_cases.rationale: Only the happy path is shown — no error handling, feature detection, or boundary inputs are surfaced.

references.rationale: see-also section links to https://chromestatus.com/feature/5079678972985344 so the cleanup script can recover this folder.

design_system.rationale: Design-system regressions: button rule overrides background without color (.ctrl-btn:hover:not(.active)).

openQuestions.title: Show the failure modes on column-width-tester
openQuestions.detail: Right now the page only demonstrates the happy path. Add at least one of: a feature-detection probe with graceful fallback, an error/throw path (empty input, invalid argument), and a boundary case (zero, max, abort).

openQuestions.title: Bring column-width-tester back onto the design system
openQuestions.detail: Design-system regressions: button rule overrides background without color (.ctrl-btn:hover:not(.active)). See CLAUDE.md rules #5, #6, #7 — CSS variables only, WCAG AA, button background+color always overridden together.

summary: column-width-tester for `text-justify` CSS property has structural gaps: the rubric flags multiple fails (see open questions). Needs a pass to convert it from a placeholder into a real concept demo.
